data.body: RELEASE v0.8.0 COMPLETE + PUBLISHED. Change 730 (version bump 0.7.1->0.8.0 across pyproject/server.json/api-stability + CHANGELOG promote + docs/releasing.md Gerrit-flow correction) merged. First release dispatch (run 29467136412) aborted at build on a PRE-EXISTING check_build_env_locked PEP503 name-normalization bug (jaraco.classes vs jaraco-classes) — first release through the new pinned build-once pipeline so never caught; filed bug caressive-noteworthy-goldfish (discovered_from release), RED->GREEN fix (_canonical collapses [-_.]->-), landed change 731 (both votes), closed Fixed. Re-dispatched run 29468059472: authorize 4 guards passed, build/wheel/sdist green, approved pypi reviewer gate as JoeOakhartNava, PUBLISHED. Verified: PyPI 0.8.0 latest (HTTP 200), GitHub Release v0.8.0 latest w/ wheel+sdist+SHA256SUMS, tag v0.8.0->a7ea420b8, MCP registry lists 0.8.0. Release ticket unevolved-cynical-cats + bug both closed. Next: deliver api-stability version-marker design proposals (user request).
